# make static gtest visible to tests targets in tests folder - propagate subproject include directories to parent
ADD_SUBDIRECTORY(googletest)
add_subdirectory(TEMPLATE_LIB)

include(FetchContent)

set(SFML_VERSION "3.1.0")

FetchContent_Declare(
    sfml
    GIT_REPOSITORY "https://github.com/SFML/SFML.git"
    GIT_TAG        "${SFML_VERSION}"
)

add_subdirectory(sfml)

FetchContent_Declare(
  imgui
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui
  GIT_TAG 97428e8ac99e339ce05eee531cf55b77b29ea709
)

FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)

FetchContent_Declare(
  imgui-sfml
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/SFML/imgui-sfml
  GIT_TAG 5e8f8fb857c8f3cff1096bf3e4402c64e3bcf6af
)
add_subdirectory(imgui-sfml)
